title: synth (aspirational)
manager: Derive a guardrail machine from properties, correct by construction — safety-game solving over Dwyer-pattern specs yields a maximally-permissive policy machine plus a certificate. This is the other aspirational bookend: instead of writing a machine and proving it satisfies a property, you state the property and synthesize a machine that provably does. Aspirational until the eval bar clears, but it is the endpoint the whole verification stack has been pointing toward from the start.
cs: synth = safety-game solving over Dwyer-pattern specs (decidable safety fragment) -> maximally-permissive policy + certificate; the correct-by-construction bookend; aspirational until eval clears.
